headline: P&L exposure: ₹20 Cr direct remediation + ₹13.8 Cr indirect (regulatory, operational, reputational) = ₹33.8 Cr total exposure
what_matters: Triggers BRSR Principle 5, GRI 408, SEBI disclosure obligations; non-compliance risks SEBI penalties of ₹10-50 Cr per violation and mandatory remediation under Child Labour Prohibition Act.
Tier 2/3 coal suppliers in Jharkhand implicated; remediation requires supplier substitution and independent audits, increasing operational costs.
Potential P/E compression of 0.1x as recurring social violations erode investor confidence; margin erosion of 4.4 bps; revenue at risk includes ₹2.5 Cr direct loss from procurement exclusion.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹20 Cr direct remediation + ₹13.8 Cr indirect (regulatory, operational, reputational) = ₹33.8 Cr total exposure
Revenue at risk: ₹2.5 Cr direct procurement loss + ₹1.3 Cr indirect investor outflow
